author: codex

patch.value: Modernize GitHub Actions and compatible direct dependency majors

Consolidate the stale Dependabot PR backlog by updating GitHub Actions to maintained majors and upgrading compatible direct packages/tooling together so the repository has one coherent verification surface instead of many conflicting bot branches.

Workflow actions use current maintained majors with valid configuration.; Direct dependency majors are upgraded where compatible; deliberate holds are documented.; Lint, typecheck, tests, builds, and package smoke tests remain green.

message: Track consolidated dependency and workflow modernization

value.author: codex
value.text: Modernized checkout v6,setup-node v6,upload-artifact v7,semantic-pull-request v6,gitleaks action v3,action-gh-release v3,Node 22.13,Bun 1.3.11,Commander 15,ESLint 10 flat config,and Vitest 4.1.10.

author: codex

value.author: codex
value.text: Merged proof: all required CI,npm compatibility,CodeQL,secret scan,semantic-title,and commit-subject checks passed on PR #25. All 16 superseded Dependabot PRs are now closed with lineage comments.

value.author: codex
value.text: TypeScript 7 remains deliberately deferred because typescript-eslint 8.64 declares a peer range below 6.1; TypeScript 5.9.3 is the current compatible line.

message: Record merged workflow and toolchain evidence

author: codex

patch.value: Modernized CI and release actions, Node and Bun baselines, Commander, ESLint flat configuration, YAML, and Vitest while documenting the TypeScript compatibility hold.
Current maintained workflow actions and coherent toolchain versions pass the complete verification surface.
PR #25 required checks all passed and merged; no open dependency PRs remain.
Maintained action majors and compatible dependency majors are merged; superseded bot PRs are closed.

message: Close after GitHub check and backlog verification
